items.title: Fireship · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Anthropic begged the world to stop AI… then shipped this
items.titleZh: Anthropic 恳求世界停止人工智能……然后发布了这个
items.summary:
渲染是交付全栈应用程序和代理的最简单的地方。前 2,000 名使用代码 RENDER-FIRESHIP 的人将获得 50 美元的积分：https://dashboard.render.com/register?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic_video&utm_campaign=2026_partnership_fireship

本周，Anthropic 发布了克劳德·寓言 (Claude Fable)，这是一款经过精心切除的 Mythos 级模型，供公众使用。但这合法吗？让我们运行它...

#编码 #编程 #ai

🔖 涵盖的主题
- 克劳德寓言发行
- 《神鬼寓言 5》与《作品 4.8》
- 《神鬼寓言 5》演示版

想要更多火船吗？

🗞️时事通讯：https://bytes.dev
🧠 课程：https://fireship.dev
items.summaryOriginal:
Render is the easiest place to ship full-stack apps and agents. The first 2,000 people to use the code RENDER-FIRESHIP will get $50 in credits: https://dashboard.render.com/register?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic_video&utm_campaign=2026_partnership_fireship

This week, Anthropic released Claude Fable, a Mythos class model that's been carefully lobotomized for public consumption. But is it legit? Let's run it...

#coding #programming #ai

🔖 Topics Covered
- Claude Fable release
- Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8
- Fable 5 Demo

Want more Fireship?

🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev
🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

items.title: Two Minute Papers · YouTube监控
items.summary:
检查固定评论以获取完整采访的链接。人工智能代理最终能否成为驱动游戏故事情节的“游戏大师”？我们探索人工智能协助玩家或创建动态、无脚本叙事的概念。了解目前如何在沉浸式游戏环境中测试人工智能以改变我们的游戏方式。 🧠 
标签：#aiinggames #gaming #ai #gamedev #futuretech
items.summaryOriginal:
Check the pinned comment for the link to the full interview. Could AI agents eventually become the "Games Master" driving your gaming storylines? We explore the concept of AI assisting players or creating dynamic, non-scripted narratives. Discover how AI is currently being tested inside immersive game environments to change how we play. 🧠 
Hashtags: #aiingames #gaming #ai #gamedev #futuretech

items.title: Machine Learning University · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Building Apps with Foundation Models - Lesson 3: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
items.titleZh: 使用基础模型构建应用程序 - 第 3 课：检索增强生成 (RAG)
items.summary: 本视频首先回顾第 2 课。然后我们将探讨模型接地的概念。接下来，我们将更深入地研究检索增强生成（RAG）。我们将研究实施 RAG 系统所涉及的工作流程，这将为您提供有关这些系统如何在生产环境中运行的实用见解。  我们还将介绍多模态嵌入，它允许人工智能系统同时理解和处理不同类型的数据，例如文本、图像、音频或视频。这些嵌入在不同模式中创建统一的表示。  最后，我们将探索多模式 RAG，这是一种将基于检索的方法与 abi 相结合的高级实现。
items.summaryOriginal: This video begins with a review of Lesson 2 . Then we'll explore the concept of grounding a model. Next, we'll dive deeper into Retrieval Augmented Generation, or RAG. We'll examine the workflow involved in implementing RAG systems, which will give you practical insights into how these systems operate in production environments.  We'll also cover multimodal embeddings, which allow AI systems to understand and process different types of data simultaneously, such as text, images, and audio or video. These embeddings create unified representations across different modalities.  Finally, we'll explore multimodal RAG, an advanced implementation that combines retrieval-based approaches with the abi...
items.summaryZh: 本视频首先回顾第 2 课。然后我们将探讨模型接地的概念。接下来，我们将更深入地研究检索增强生成（RAG）。我们将研究实施 RAG 系统所涉及的工作流程，这将为您提供有关这些系统如何在生产环境中运行的实用见解。  我们还将介绍多模态嵌入，它允许人工智能系统同时理解和处理不同类型的数据，例如文本、图像、音频或视频。这些嵌入在不同模式中创建统一的表示。  最后，我们将探索多模式 RAG，这是一种将基于检索的方法与 abi 相结合的高级实现。

items.titleZh: Responsible AI - 第 1 课：评估大型语言模型
items.summary:
本视频将首先回顾生成式 AI 模块 1（生成式 AI 的基础知识），涵盖之前讨论的关键概念和主题。然后，我们将探讨评估大型语言模型的重要性，并讨论为什么这个评估过程至关重要。该视频将深入探讨评估法学硕士的各种方法和途径，包括评估其表现、能力和潜在局限性的技术。此外，我们还将介绍 Amazon Bedrock 上法学硕士的绩效评估。

--------------------

该视频是机器学习大学开源“Responsible AI”系列的一部分。访问全套课程、实践实验室和 Jup...
items.summaryOriginal:
This video will begin with a review of Generative AI Module 1 (Fundamentals of Generative AI), covering the key concepts and topics discussed previously. We will then explore the importance of evaluating large language models and discuss why this evaluation process is crucial. This video will delve into various methods and approaches for evaluating LLMs, including techniques for assessing their performance, capabilities, and potential limitations. Additionally, we will cover the performance evaluation of LLMs on Amazon Bedrock.

--------------------

This video is part of Machine Learning University’s open-source "Responsible AI" series. Access the full set of lessons, hands-on labs, and Jup...

In this video, we cover a review of the previous lesson, where we introduced the core dimensions of responsible AI. We will then discuss jailbreaking, guardrails, and debiasing.

--------------------

This video is part of Machine Learning University’s open-source "Responsible AI" series. Access the full set of lessons, hands-on labs, and Jupyter Notebooks here:

🔗 GitHub Repository: https://github.com/aws-mlu/aws-mlu-eep-generative-ai

items.title: Andrej Karpathy · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Deep Dive into LLMs like ChatGPT
items.titleZh: 深入研究 ChatGPT 等法学硕士
items.summary:
这是对为 ChatGPT 和相关产品提供支持的大语言模型 (LLM) AI 技术的普通受众的深入探讨。它涵盖了如何开发模型的完整培训堆栈，以及如何思考其“心理学”的心智模型，以及如何在实际应用中充分利用它们。我大约一年前就已经有了一个“法学硕士简介”视频，但这只是随机演讲的重新录制，所以我想循环播放并制作一个更全面的版本。

导师
Andrej 是 OpenAI 的创始成员（2015 年），然后是 Tesla 的人工智能高级总监（2017-2022 年），现在是 Eureka Labs 的创始人，该实验室正在建设一所人工智能原生学校。他的目标是在这...
items.summaryOriginal:
This is a general audience deep dive into the Large Language Model (LLM) AI technology that powers ChatGPT and related products. It is covers the full training stack of how the models are developed, along with mental models of how to think about their "psychology", and how to get the best use them in practical applications. I have one "Intro to LLMs" video already from ~year ago, but that is just a re-recording of a random talk, so I wanted to loop around and do a lot more comprehensive version.

Instructor
Andrej was a founding member at OpenAI (2015) and then Sr. Director of AI at Tesla (2017-2022), and is now a founder at Eureka Labs, which is building an AI-native school. His goal in thi...

items.title: Andrej Karpathy · YouTube监控
items.summary:
我们从头开始重现 GPT-2 (124M)。该视频涵盖了整个过程：首先我们构建 GPT-2 网络，然后我们将其训练优化为非常快，然后我们按照 GPT-2 和 GPT-3 论文及其超参数设置训练运行，然后我们点击运行，第二天早上回来查看我们的结果，并享受一些有趣的模型生成。请记住，在某些地方，该视频建立在“从零到英雄”播放列表中早期视频的知识基础上（请参阅我的频道）。您还可以将此视频视为构建我的 nanoGPT 存储库，到最后大约有 90% 相似。

链接：
- build-nanogpt GitHub 存储库，该视频中的所有更改均作为单独提交：htt...
items.summaryOriginal:
We reproduce the GPT-2 (124M) from scratch. This video covers the whole process: First we build the GPT-2 network, then we optimize its training to be really fast, then we set up the training run following the GPT-2 and GPT-3 paper and their hyperparameters, then we hit run, and come back the next morning to see our results, and enjoy some amusing model generations. Keep in mind that in some places this video builds on the knowledge from earlier videos in the Zero to Hero Playlist (see my channel). You could also see this video as building my nanoGPT repo, which by the end is about 90% similar.

Links:
- build-nanogpt GitHub repo, with all the changes in this video as individual commits: htt...

items.title: Andrej Karpathy · YouTube监控
items.summary: 分词器是大型语言模型 (LLM) 中必要且普遍的组件，它在字符串和标记（文本块）之间进行转换。分词器是 LLM 管道的一个完全独立的阶段：它们有自己的训练集、训练算法（字节对编码），并且在训练后实现两个基本功能：从字符串到令牌的encode()，以及从令牌到字符串的decode()。在本次讲座中，我们从头开始构建 OpenAI 的 GPT 系列中使用的 Tokenizer。在这个过程中，我们会看到LLM的很多奇怪的行为和问题实际上都可以追溯到标记化。我们将讨论其中的一些问题，讨论为什么代币化如此流行......
items.summaryOriginal: The Tokenizer is a necessary and pervasive component of Large Language Models (LLMs), where it translates between strings and tokens (text chunks). Tokenizers are a completely separate stage of the LLM pipeline: they have their own training sets, training algorithms (Byte Pair Encoding), and after training implement two fundamental functions: encode() from strings to tokens, and decode() back from tokens to strings. In this lecture we build from scratch the Tokenizer used in the GPT series from OpenAI. In the process, we will see that a lot of weird behaviors and problems of LLMs actually trace back to tokenization. We'll go through a number of these issues, discuss why tokenization is at fa...
items.summaryZh: 分词器是大型语言模型 (LLM) 中必要且普遍的组件，它在字符串和标记（文本块）之间进行转换。分词器是 LLM 管道的一个完全独立的阶段：它们有自己的训练集、训练算法（字节对编码），并且在训练后实现两个基本功能：从字符串到令牌的encode()，以及从令牌到字符串的decode()。在本次讲座中，我们从头开始构建 OpenAI 的 GPT 系列中使用的 Tokenizer。在这个过程中，我们会看到LLM的很多奇怪的行为和问题实际上都可以追溯到标记化。我们将讨论其中的一些问题，讨论为什么代币化如此流行......
